specific_promise: The reader will learn what specific detail is missing from herbal guides and why that missing detail is dangerous. The answer is dosing information — specific amounts, adjusted by form, age, weight.
delivery_test: The body must name the missing detail (dosing or dose amounts) explicitly within the first 200 words and explain at least one concrete consequence of that detail being absent (e.g., guessing amounts, taking ineffective doses, overstimulating a bodily system).
minimum_delivery: Begin in Section 1 (Lead). Substantially resolved by end of Section 2 (Problem Expansion). Sections 3-6 handle belief chain.
